nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source for obscure facts
nodes.grounding_span: start research -> ask bot -> (de)confirm bot's info after 1/2hour to 1 hour of SCOURING the internet

nodes.label: AI reliability for tangible item attributes
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for historical context facts
nodes.grounding_span: For model numbers, materials (diecast vs. wood) the actual model's release date...most of the time (probably 90% + if you want a number). For FACTS (release dates, airlines used, boxcar operators)...coin flip territory.

nodes.label: AI as creative phrasing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: bots help there, since they're usually pretty good with 'language suggestions'

nodes.label: Verification and brutal honesty in listings
nodes.grounding_span: the best rule of thumb is: verification and brutal honesty!

nodes.label: AI for scaling calculations
nodes.label_negative: AI not used for broader business strategy
nodes.grounding_span: I might need AI help not only for higher volume selling, but also for buying strategies

nodes.label: Trust and credibility with customers
nodes.grounding_span: it could have been a huge issue for my positive seller rating if he was upset or I handled it wrong!

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: Customers can smell 'AI-speak' from a mile away, so you have to use your own language

nodes.label: Business efficiency and cost-effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: efficiency becomes key! I might need AI help not only for higher volume selling, but also for buying strategies

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: I felt relieved to have it for some help in the early days

nodes.label: Caution and skepticism toward AI for historical facts
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not always as sure that I can trust that!

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as editing aid
nodes.grounding_span: bots help there, since they're usually pretty good with 'language suggestions'

nodes.label: Commitment to honesty and transparency
nodes.grounding_span: the best rule of thumb is: verification and brutal honesty!

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: if models could come up with sound rules, equations, strategies, best practices...tremendously helpful!

nodes.label: Systematic iterative verification — works independently first, then checks with AI
nodes.grounding_span: start research -> ask bot -> (de)confirm bot's info after 1/2hour to 1 hour of SCOURING the internet

nodes.label: Experience-driven calibration of trust
nodes.grounding_span: For model numbers, materials...most of the time (probably 90% +). For FACTS...coin flip territory.
